overview: A modern, single-page personal portfolio for Deepak Katiyar — a Front-End React Developer and B.Tech CSE student. Showcases projects, skills, achievements, and contact details in a professional layout.
features: Hero section with name, title, and call-to-action
About section with education and profile summary
Projects showcase with live demo and GitHub links
Skills organized by category with visual tags
Responsive design for all screen sizes
Smooth scroll navigation with active link highlighting
Footer with social and contact links
